case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. EMILLY CANLAS et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT RE: ATTORNEYS FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
